stepAnswer: A line segment from a vertex perpendicular to the opposite side (or its extension).
stepTitle: Which of the following best describes the altitude of a triangle?
choices: A line segment from a vertex perpendicular to the opposite side (or its extension).
A line segment connecting a vertex to the midpoint of the opposite side.
A line segment that bisects an angle of the triangle.
A line segment connecting the midpoints of two sides of the triangle.
